changelog: Main Testing Release for v0.2.0.4. Verified repository updates, Linux/Docker deployment, admin announcement UI, login-page support, and writable web-path banner injection for non-standard Jellyfin installs.
description: Server-wide announcements and maintenance banners with validated repository updates and configurable path support for non-standard installations.
name: Announcements
overview: Display admin announcements to all users in the web UI.
